label: System / Role
hint: Defines who the assistant is and what it must do.

label: Rules / Constraints
hint: Non‑negotiables: do/don’t, policy, safety, length, tone.

label: Dynamic Facts
hint: Today’s date, IDs, current status. Keep separate from rules.

label: Grounding Knowledge
hint: Short, relevant excerpts (avoid dumping whole docs).

label: Memory
hint: Rolling summary / pinned facts — only what’s needed now.

label: Examples (Few‑shot)
hint: 1–2 mini examples to demonstrate desired output pattern.

label: Evaluation / Checks
hint: Success criteria, test cases, and self-check steps to validate output.

label: Output Format / Schema
hint: Forces structure: headings, checklist, JSON-like fields.

label: User Request
hint: The task/question for this turn. Place last.

label: Nice‑to‑have Background
hint: Extra context that may help but isn’t required.
